title: Canopy Growth Announces Strategic Recapitalization Transactions Significantly Strengthening Balance Sheet to Support Growth Strategy
text: Canopy Growth announced strategic recapitalization transactions in January 2026 significantly strengthening balance sheet. Company received net proceeds of US$150 million in term loan maturing January 2031. Term loan bears interest at annual rate equal to applicable Term SOFR rate (subject to 3.25% minimum floor) plus 6.25%, representing decrease in company's cash interest rate compared with existing senior secured debt. Cash position strengthened to approximately CAD 425 million following recapitalization. Company achieved net cash position of CAD 146 million after accounting for debt versus previous net debt position. Strategic refinancing pushed debt maturities to 2031, lowering near-term refinancing pressure and improving liquidity. Free cash outflow improved to around CAD 19 million in Q3, reflecting cost reductions and better working capital management. Refinancing supports growth strategy and path to profitability targets.
